calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Wai Ling Tong, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Shi Yun Wu and with Cantonese Interpreter Shuna Lei.
No appearance by the Minor's father Siu Ki Ng, but signed the Petition consented to the name change of the Minor.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Swan Shiyun Ng.
Decree signed in open court.
